index afe32e3378eb..695f5623407b 100644
--- a/www/py-werkzeug/Makefile
+++ b/www/py-werkzeug/Makefile
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # Created by: Moggie <moggie@elasticmind.net>
 
 PORTNAME=	werkzeug
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.1
+PORTVERSION=	2.0.0
 CATEGORIES=	www python

 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
